content.problemStatement: Write a C program to modify the given string **"RoadChef"** to **"CodeChef"** and print the updated string.
content.outputFormat: Print the string CodeChef followed by a newline.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program does not read any input and directly prints the required string.
No input is needed; the output is always the same.
Constant output irrespective of any input.

solution.approach: The task is to output a constant string. No computation or input handling is needed. The program simply prints "CodeChef" and terminates. This satisfies the requirement of modifying the given string "RoadChef" to "CodeChef".

code.Java:
import java.io.*;
public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{System.out.println("CodeChef");}}
